questions.q: Which nation qualified for the 2026 World Cup after defeating Italy in a penalty shootout?
questions.correctText: Bosnia-Herzegovina qualified for the 2026 World Cup by beating Italy in a penalty shootout.

questions.q: What was the primary reason the NFL reportedly scrapped dual Monday Night Football games, citing fan feedback?
options: Fans felt conflicted to choose between games
questions.correctText: The NFL scrapped dual Monday Night Football games, as fans reportedly felt conflicted to choose between them, among other criticisms.

questions.q: For the first time in their history, Italy has failed to qualify for how many consecutive World Cups?
questions.correctText: Italy failed to qualify for three consecutive World Cups (2018, 2022, and 2026) for the first time in their history.

questions.q: When was the last time Italy won a knockout match at the World Cup, which due to recent qualification failures, means they will now wait a minimum of 24 years to potentially win another?
questions.correctText: The last time Italy won a knockout match at the World Cup was the 2006 final. Due to failing to qualify for the 2026 World Cup, it will be a minimum of 24 years until they can win a knockout match again.

questions.q: Cleveland Browns Head Coach Todd Monken missed the NFL Head Coach Group Photo for what ironic reason?
options: He was getting a haircut for the photo
He was at another team event
questions.correctText: Todd Monken missed the NFL Head Coach Group Photo because he was getting a haircut for the photo itself.
